snp1.11:2.4: the body isn’t seen for what it is:
snp1.11:3.1: filled with intestines, filled with stomach,
snp1.11:3.2: with the lump of the liver,
snp1.11:5.1: On top of that, in nine streams,
snp1.11:5.2: filth is always flowing from it—
snp1.11:6.2:
from the mouth it vomits :
now vomit,
snp1.11:6.4:
from the body :
beads of sweat.
snp1.11:7.2:
its hollow head is filled with brains.
The fool, beset by ignorance,
snp1.11:8.3: cast away in a charnel ground,
snp1.11:8.4: even relatives don’t care for it.
snp1.11:9.4: along with any other animals there.
snp1.11:10.1: Having heard the Awakened One’s words,
snp1.11:11.4: he should let desire for the body fade away.
snp1.11:12.3: at the deathless, the calm, the unfallen, undying state
snp1.11:12.4:
of unbinding.
This two-footed thing is cared for,
snp1.11:13.3:
oozing out here & there:
Whoever would think,
snp1.11:14.1: on the basis of a body like this,
snp1.11:14.2: to exalt himself or disparage another—
snp1.11:14.4: What is that if not blindness?
